testcase.name: test_full_graph_execution

failure.message: ValueError: I/O operation on closed file.

testcase.failure:
tests\test_integration\test_e2e_user_flow.py:633: in test_full_graph_execution assert stop_reason in [StopReason.TASK_COMPLETE, StopReason.CONTINUE, StopReason.MAX_ITERATIONS] E AssertionError: assert <StopReason.IDLE_LOOP: 'idle_loop'> in [<StopReason.TASK_COMPLETE: 'task_complete'>, <StopReason.CONTINUE: 'continue'>, <StopReason.MAX_ITERATIONS: 'max_iterations'>]
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: tests\test_integration\test_e2e_user_flow.py:637: in test_full_graph_execution pytest.skip(f"Graph execution failed: {e}") E Skipped: Graph execution failed: assert <StopReason.IDLE_LOOP: 'idle_loop'> in [<StopReason.TASK_COMPLETE: 'task_complete'>, <StopReason.CONTINUE: 'continue'>, <StopReason.MAX_ITERATIONS: 'max_iterations'>]
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: D:\python\3.12.10\Lib\contextlib.py:158: in __exit__ self.gen.throw(value) E ValueError: I/O operation on closed file.

testcase.name: test_full_graph_execution

error.message: failed on teardown with "ValueError: I/O operation on closed file"

testcase.error: D:\python\3.12.10\Lib\contextlib.py:137: in __enter__ return next(self.gen) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ D:\python\3.12.10\Lib\tempfile.py:499: in func_wrapper return func(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E ValueError: I/O operation on closed file
